steps.title: Identify the central paradox
steps.content: The underlined claim establishes a contrast: the sculptures “appear as delicate as a breeze” but “are actually very durable.” The right answer must illustrate this paradox between appearance and reality.

steps.title: Match material properties to the claim
steps.content: Choice C states the materials are “flexible” and “strong”—directly explaining how sculptures can appear delicate (flexibility) while being actually durable (strength). The other three address design processes or local landmarks, not material properties. That matches choice C — C is correct.
